title: Fulfillment Technology Analyst - Sydney DC
description: Support and optimize warehouse management systems (WMS) including Körber/HighJump Warehouse Advantage and Dematic WMS (Matflo) platforms. Drive implementation, maintenance, and support of strategic WMS. Participate in requirements definition and technical design of product enhancements. Coordinate and execute UAT testing. Work with global WMS technology colleagues on troubleshooting and managing changes to WMS integrations. Create reports using SQL and Excel for improved operational visibility and performance. 1+ years WMS experience in RF-based distribution, ecommerce fulfillment. SQL, Excel, Google Sheets required. 2-year contract, 5 days onsite Eastern Creek. Supply chain, logistics, warehouse automation.

title: Data and Reporting Analyst
description: Developing and maintaining Power BI dashboards and reports for a $2 billion infrastructure program. Analyzing cost, schedule, risk, and delivery performance data to identify trends. Converting business requirements into reporting outputs. Preparing executive presentations and stakeholder reports. Streamlining reporting processes and data quality frameworks. Advanced Power BI including dashboard design and data modelling. SQL, data analysis, analytics, KPI reporting, process improvement. Agile environment, Confluence documentation.

title: WMS Operations Analyst
description: Functional expert and primary support contact for WMS across the region. Execute full-cycle WMS implementation including data collection, documentation, system testing, staff training, and go-live support. Deploy new WMS functionalities for continuous improvement. Troubleshooting, training, and performance enhancement. Leverage knowledge of warehousing, transportation, and material handling equipment to optimize operations. 3PL logistics, supply chain, warehouse management, UAT testing, process optimization. WMS implementation and support experience required.

title: Supply Chain Analyst
description: Full-time permanent analyst role at growing food wholesale distribution business. Support inventory management, purchasing, and logistics through data analysis. Strong Excel and data analysis skills required. Supply chain, logistics, distribution, inventory, FMCG, 3PL, warehouse, reporting, insights, process improvement. SAP or ERP experience preferred. $85,000 + Super.

title: Level 1 Technical Support Analyst
description: Technical support position providing desktop and software troubleshooting, system configuration, and user assistance. Level 1-2 support, application troubleshooting, IT systems support, incident management, documentation, SOP. Homebush NSW. $70,000-$80,000/year.

title: Application Support Analyst
description: Technology support role providing system maintenance, user support, user training, and product improvements. Application troubleshooting and configuration, IT systems support, Level 1-2 support, incident reporting, stakeholder communication, UAT testing, documentation. Sydney CBD. $350-$400/day contract.

title: Operations Analytics Manager
description: Operations and analytics manager role bridging Sales, Finance, and Data teams. Managing dashboards and scorecards using HubSpot and Omni systems. Data analysis, KPI reporting, insights, analytics, stakeholder reporting, process improvement. Excel, data pipeline management. Alexandria NSW. High-growth startup environment.
